description: Velocity pressure exposure coefficients (Kz and Kh) per ASCE 7-16 Table 26.10-1
interpolation_note: For heights between tabulated values, use linear interpolation between the two nearest heights

usage.Kz: Use at each height z for windward wall pressure calculation
usage.Kh: Use at mean roof height h for leeward wall, side walls, and roof pressure calculations — same table, evaluate at z = h

note_on_0_to_15: All heights from 0 to 15 ft use the same Kz value as the 15 ft row

exposure_B.description: Urban and suburban areas, wooded areas, closely spaced obstructions

exposure_C.description: Open terrain with scattered obstructions generally less than 30 ft tall

exposure_D.description: Flat, unobstructed areas and water surfaces

analytical_formula.description: Alternative to table lookup — compute Kz directly
analytical_formula.constraints: Valid for 15 ft <= z <= zg. For z < 15 ft, use z = 15 ft.

parameters.alpha: Power law exponent — see per-exposure value above
parameters.zg: Gradient height (ft) — see per-exposure value above
